Summer 2026 Admissions

Show Us What You're Curious About

No test scores. No transcripts. No essays about your greatest weakness. We want to know what you'd build if you had two weeks, expert guidance, and a city to work in.

15 min
Application
5 days
Decision
Rolling
Admissions
Start Your Application

Open for NYC, Lisbon, Porto, and Seoul.

Students collaborating — candid

What We Look For

We're not selecting for polish. We're looking for students who have a genuine itch to understand how things get built — and the initiative to start figuring it out before anyone tells them to.

Curiosity

You ask questions that don't have obvious answers. You've gone down a rabbit hole or two.

Initiative

You've started something. It doesn't need to have succeeded. It needs to have been yours.

Self-Awareness

You can name what you're good at and what you're not. Honest about where you are.

Resilience

Two weeks of real work involves real failure. You get back up and try differently.

Generosity

You make people around you better. You give honest feedback. You share credit.

Range

You don't fit neatly into one box. We value the unexpected combination.

We do not require prior experience in product, business, or marketing. Some students arrive with side projects; others arrive with questions. Both are welcome.
I almost didn't apply because I didn't think I was 'business enough.' Turns out that's exactly what they were looking for.
Accepted student, Lisbon 2025

How It Works

01

Apply Online

15 Minutes

A short form about you, your interests, and which city and track. No essays. You can save and return.

02

We Review

5 Business Days

Our team reads every application — no algorithms. If we have questions, we'll reach out directly.

03

Accept & Enroll

Deposit Secures Spot

Enrollment agreement and invoice. A deposit secures your place. Financial aid decisions communicated at this stage.

04

Get Ready

2 Weeks Before

Track brief, city guide, cohort introduction. Light pre-reading. You'll arrive ready.

Tuition & Aid

Program Tuition
$X,XXX
Per student · Two weeks
  • All sessions, materials, facilitation
  • Lunch daily
  • City activities and cultural programming
  • Alumni network access
Housing (Optional)
Varies by City
Supervised · Near venue
  • Vetted local housing partners
  • 24/7 on-site support
  • Walking distance to studio
  • Day-student option available
Financial aid is available and need-based. No separate application. Both tuition and housing support offered. Aid recipients participate fully alongside all other students.

Questions

Is there an age requirement?
Designed for students ages 16–19. Younger applicants with exceptional initiative considered case-by-case.
Can I apply to multiple cities?
Yes. Select a first-choice and optional second-choice city on the application.
What if I don't know which track to choose?
That's normal. Tell us what interests you. Track selection isn't final until day one.
Is the application competitive?
Selective, not competitive. We're building a cohort, not ranking individuals.
What's the refund policy?
Full refund (minus deposit) if cancelled 30+ days before. We handle edge cases like humans — talk to us.
I have more questions.
Good. Email admissions@hudsonlabventures.com — a real person replies within 24 hours.
Two weeks. One project. A network that lasts.

Rolling admissions. 15-minute application. Decisions within 5 days.

Start Your Application

Questions? admissions@hudsonlabventures.com
